_instructions.name: Business name used in logo, footer and schema markup.
_instructions.legal_name: Full legal business name for privacy policy and contracts.
_instructions.phones: Array of phone numbers. First one is the primary CTA.
_instructions.emails: Array of contact emails. First one is the primary.
_instructions.address: US business address. 'full' is used in schema and footer.
_instructions.hours: Weekly schedule. Add as many entries as needed.
_instructions.license: License text shown in footer and about.
_instructions.insurance: Insurance statement shown in trust sections.
_instructions.years_experience: Years in business as string, e.g. '15+'.
_instructions.founded_year: Year the company was founded. Optional.
_instructions.coordinates: OPTIONAL placeholder GeoCoordinates (latitude/longitude strings). FAKE/EXAMPLE only — never a real client location. Used for schema.org geo markup when present.
_instructions.social: Only include networks the business actively uses.
_instructions.services_offered: Core service names and slugs. Used to validate services.json and build service landing pages.

name: Example Masonry & Hardscape
tagline: Building outdoor spaces that last across Virginia Beach.
insurance: Fully insured with general liability and workers' compensation.
service_area: Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Chesapeake, Suffolk & surrounding areas
type_of_services: Masonry, hardscaping, patios, retaining walls, concrete, pavers and outdoor living.
